boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: customer tenant migration.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Open dependency blocks execution until source closure
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current tenant ID|migration window|success criteria match unresolved

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record leaves the exact customer tenant migration boundary open because current tenant ID, migration window, and success criteria are unresolved. Policy requires current source records to close the boundary before execution, and communication context cannot substitute for authorization.
